description_long: This is a large, visually striking stage structure with a geometric, multi-layered platform in black and gold tones. The central area features a raised hexagonal platform, flanked by symmetrical side wings with vertical columns and decorative lighting elements. The backdrop includes illuminated panels and metallic framework, giving the stage a modern, glamorous appearance. The design incorporates reflective surfaces and sharp, angular lines, reminiscent of Art Deco influences. The stage is suitable for performances, ceremonies, or public presentations in urban parks or plazas. Its robust construction and expansive surface make it ideal for accommodating multiple performers or speakers.
description: A grand, black and gold stage with geometric platforms, illuminated panels, and metallic accents, designed for public performances or ceremonies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the stage, central platform, and illuminated backdrop.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth, side wings, and vertical columns of the stage.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal visible detail, mostly showing the backdrop structure.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, mirroring view 1, showing the other side wing and columns.
